name: discord-watchdog-alerts
description: Monitor Discord server activity and send instant alerts via Telegram, Pushover, SMS, or email.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check config.js && node --check notifiers/dispatcher.js && node --check notifiers/telegram.js && node --check notifiers/pushover.js && node --check notifiers/sms.js && node --check notifiers/email.js
